title: dasyphyllum colombianum
intro: Dasyphyllum colombianum, also known as Colombian Buttonbush, is a type of flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dasyphyllum colombianum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
